acf.excerpt: Screened, ticketed traffic controllers and implementers, inducted and ready to deploy across live road environments.
Implementation, operation and removal of compliant temporary traffic management to MUTCD QLD and TMR standards.
Safe, compliant lane and shoulder closures for roadworks, maintenance and infrastructure delivery.
Protected routes and managed crossings that guide pedestrians and cyclists safely around active works.
24/7 reactive crews and supervisors mobilised fast for incidents and unplanned works.
Supervised, well-lit night and after-hours traffic management for low-impact delivery.
GPS-verified inspections and end-of-shift digital reports that keep every shift audit-ready.
Variable message signs, boards and devices supplied, delivered and maintained.
Coordination of permits and road occupancy approvals so works proceed lawfully and on schedule.
Traffic control for roadworks, earthworks and major civil project delivery.
Safe access for water, power, gas and telecommunications works.
Compliant, audit-ready delivery for TMR and local councils.
Crowd, road and access management for events and private works.

acf.blurb: Our central hub for South East Queensland, supporting civil, government and utilities works across the metro network.
Crews servicing the M1 corridor, coastal works and events across the Gold Coast and Logan.
Coverage from Caboolture to Noosa for infrastructure, maintenance and council projects.
Cross-border support for the Tweed and Northern Rivers, working to NSW and QLD requirements.

acf.quote: "STM's crews turned up ticketed, briefed and ready. The end-of-shift reports made our compliance reviews straightforward."

testimonial.title: Site Manager, Infrastructure project, Gold Coast

acf.quote: "Reliable through a difficult night-works program. Their supervisors kept the site safe and the traffic moving."
acf.author_role: Site Manager, Infrastructure project, Gold Coast

testimonial.title: Works Coordinator, Local council, Sunshine Coast

acf.quote: "The real-time reporting and GPS-verified inspections gave us the visibility we needed for a council audit."
acf.author_role: Works Coordinator, Local council, Sunshine Coast
